# Syahdan Hayyan Alawy

I am a Robotics & AI Engineering student at Universitas Airlangga (batch 2023). I build things at the intersection of hardware and software, ranging from autonomous robots to AI-powered dashboards.

## Projects
- Solar Panel Tracker & Weather Detection (ESP32, MQTT, IoT) - 2025
- ESP32-Cam Stream (ESP32, Node.js) - 2025
- Pallet AMR Simulator (ROS 2, Gazebo, Nav2) - 2025
- Lane Detection for Autonomous Vehicle (Python, OpenCV) - 2025
- Loan Default Prediction (CatBoost, SHAP) - 2025
- WhatsApp Chatbot (Node.js, OpenAI) - 2024
- JM-BOT Delivery Robot (Embedded, Robotics) - 2025
- A* Pathfinder — East Java Logistics (JavaScript, AI) - 2025
- Up/Down Counter 7-Segment (Digital Circuits, IC 555) - 2025

## Tools & Subdomains
- TEEP Finder (teep.bica.ca): Find TEEP scholarships in one place and get matched!
- AIPrep (aiprep.bica.ca): AI-powered study platform and material generator.
- Scraptor (scraptor.bica.ca): Meso-scale web scraping service.
- Public Drive (drive.bica.ca): My public file archive and project stash.

## Skills
- Languages: Python, C / C++, HTML / CSS / JavaScript, React
- Robotics / AI: ROS / ROS 2, Gazebo Sim, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, IoT / ESP32
- Tools: Git / GitHub, OpenCV, Autodesk Inventor, Soldering, Cloud / VPS
